title: Execution of conveyances
doc_html:
§309.  Execution of conveyances

All conveyances made by a cemetery authority shall be signed by such officer or officers as are authorized by the cemetery authority.

Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.

§309.  Execution of conveyances
All conveyances made by a cemetery authority shall be signed by such officer or officers as are authorized by the cemetery authority.
Acts 1974, No. 417, §1.
